about.title: About Me
paragraphs: Hello! I'm Kevin Loving, an AI and data systems engineer focused on building autonomous multi-agent systems and scalable machine learning infrastructure.
My work sits at the intersection of machine learning, distributed systems, and real-world automation. I build AI systems that can reason, interact with tools, and operate in persistent environments.

I recently completed a Master of Science in Information Management with a Data Science specialization at the University of Washington, where I focused on machine learning systems, agentic AI architectures, and large-scale data analysis.
This site highlights my research, engineering projects, and professional experience across AI startups, large-scale enterprise systems, and data-driven product development.

highlights: Designed and implemented a distributed multi-agent AI system enabling autonomous decision making and tool use in persistent environments.
Built scalable containerized microservices (Docker, Kubernetes, Kafka) supporting agent orchestration, model inference, and real-time logging.
Developed Python-based inference and data pipelines to capture agent state, actions, and outcomes for analysis and training.
Created control loops and agent tooling interfaces allowing models to safely call external tools and reason over their outputs.
Defined technical roadmap translating experimental agentic AI research into production-ready services.
Founded and operate a construction and restoration business managing projects, budgets, scheduling, and client communication end-to-end.

roles.position: Scenic Artist & Set Builder — Multiple Theater Companies
highlights: Delivered complex production builds across multiple theater organizations while coordinating cross-team project timelines.
Reduced material costs through resource sharing and improved build planning.
Applied data-driven experimentation and dashboarding to optimize content and monetization strategy.
Increased average viewership by 457% and developed profitable sponsorship and merchandise partnerships.
Developed machine learning models for demand forecasting and dynamic vendor pricing.
Designed analytics pipelines and data architecture supporting inventory optimization and investment decisions.
Presented technical product strategy to secure partnerships and pre-seed funding.
Led 50+ global HR platform releases and migrations across UKG and Salesforce systems.
Authored technical specifications and migration roadmaps that rescued a failing system transition.
Identified payroll scalability risks and delivered a redesigned workflow reducing manual processing by 77%.
Built ML-assisted tooling that auto-generated UAT test cases, reducing case authoring time by up to 90%.
Standardized documentation and led workshops improving technical writing and project delivery quality.
Led global UAT testing for 20+ retail product releases supporting Amazon Go and Amazon Books launches.
Delivered testing cycles 28% ahead of schedule through improved coordination and planning.
Developed VBA automation reducing UAT preparation time by 87%.
Created self-service documentation that reduced duplicate support requests by over 90%.
Designed wireframes and conducted usability experiments for enterprise SaaS platforms.
Translated qualitative and quantitative research insights into shipped product features.

schools.degree: Master of Science in Information Management

contact.title: Contact
paragraphs: I'm interested in research collaborations, PhD opportunities, and roles focused on machine learning systems, AI infrastructure, and autonomous agents.
